segments.text: O Lord God, to whom vengeance belongs— O God, to whom vengeance belongs, shine forth!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Rise up, O Judge of the earth; Render punishment to the proud.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Lord, how long will the wicked, How long will the wicked triumph?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They utter speech, and speak insolent things;
All the workers of iniquity boast in themselves.
segments.speaker: Wicked People

segments.text: They break in pieces Your people, O Lord, And afflict Your heritage.
They slay the widow and the stranger, And murder the fatherless.
The Lord does not see, Nor does the God of Jacob understand.
segments.speaker: Wicked People

segments.text: Understand, you senseless among the people; And you fools, when will you be wise?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He who planted the ear, shall He not hear? He who formed the eye, shall He not see?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He who instructs the nations, shall He not correct, He who teaches man knowledge?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The Lord knows the thoughts of man, That they are futile.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Blessed is the man whom You instruct, O Lord, And teach out of Your law,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: That You may give him rest from the days of adversity, Until the pit is dug for the wicked.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For the Lord will not cast off His people, Nor will He forsake His inheritance.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But judgment will return to righteousness, And all the upright in heart will follow it.
Who will rise up for me against the evildoers? Who will stand up for me against the workers of iniquity?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Unless the Lord had been my help, My soul would soon have settled in silence.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: If I say, 'My foot slips,' Your mercy, O Lord, will hold me up.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: In the multitude of my anxieties within me, Your comforts delight my soul.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Shall the throne of iniquity, which devises evil by law, Have fellowship with You?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They gather together against the life of the righteous, And condemn innocent blood.
But the Lord has been my defense, And my God the rock of my refuge.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He has brought on them their own iniquity, And shall cut them off in their own wickedness; The Lord our God shall cut them off.
segments.speaker: God
